SAR.Subject: Investment Fraud - AI Trading Scam

Transaction.Description: Wire Transfers totaling $20,000 to SecureInvest LLC

SAR.SuspiciousActivity: Reported victim alleges being contacted via Telegram by an individual claiming to be an AI trading expert. Victim transferred funds to SecureInvest LLC, an entity located in Belize, under the false pretense of high-yield returns. Victim's subsequent withdrawal request was denied, and they are unable to access their funds. Suspected investment fraud scheme involving AI trading and offshore entities.
